entities.name: WebDriver BiDi
entities.context: A specification for interacting with web driver commands and events

entities.name: Permissions specification
entities.context: An extension that relates to WebDriver BiDi

entities.name: CDDL
entities.context: A format for command type definitions

relationships.context: WebDriver BiDi can be specified as an extension in the Permissions specification
The specification requires command's type definitions in CDDL format
